pcr: EPD Hub Core PCR v1.2 (2025-03-24); cPCR EN 16757
notes: Product name appears as 'Envirocrete® 40% 32MPa Melbourne South-East' on the cover page, while the structured 'Product name' field (p4) reads only 'Envirocrete® 40% 32MPa'. The region is retained here because this is a location-specific, multi-site-grouped declaration (7 sites averaged by production volume, p6): Cranbourne, Clayton, Dandenong, Healesville, Montrose, Nunawading, Pakenham.

Compressive strength class printed as '32 MPa' (Product characteristics, p4) with no AS-class letter prefix (e.g. no 'N32'), unlike the product name's '32MPa' (no space). raw_class taken verbatim from the Product characteristics field. Product standards field cites 'AS 1379' with no edition year (unlike HUB-5943's 'AS 1379-2007').

Scope is cradle-to-gate (A1-A3) plus C1-C4, D only; A4-A5 explicitly 'Modules not declared' (p5 system-boundary table and p11 narrative) despite the LCA covering a transport/installation description — no A4-A5 figures are given.
Core impact table (EN 15804+A2, EF 3.1) is a two-page spread: A1/A2/A3/A1-A3 on p13, C1/C2/C3/C4/D on p14. gwp_total.source_page records p13 (primary/product-stage page).

gwp_a1a3_alt sourced from the separate 'Environmental impacts – EN 15804+A1, CML / ISO 21930' table (p17, GWP A1-A3 = 273), not from the 'Additional indicator – GWP-GHG' table (p18, A1-A3 = 274) — GWP-GHG is never used for gwp_a1a3_alt per schema.
lca_tool given only as 'One Click LCA EPD Generator' (p5, p12) with no version number stated anywhere in this document, unlike HUB-5943 which cites 'v3.2.3'.

Verification checkbox marks (Internal/External) were not recoverable from PDF text extraction; type inferred as 'external' from 'Category of EPD: Third party verified EPD', the named EPD verifier (Vera Durão), and the p20 third-party verification statement.
